languages.text: "Так точно, капитан! Прошу прощения, забылся, проявил слабость".
"Yes, Captain! Apologies for this show of weakness. I overstepped."
languages.original_text: "Так точно, капитан! Прошу прощения, забылся, проявил слабость".

traits.locale_text: "Yes, Captain! Apologies for this show of weakness. I overstepped."
"Yes, Captain! Apologies for this show of weakness. I overstepped."
"Ah, bite me in the arse with a fang-flower! Captain, just like old times. Let's get hunting before I change my mind."
"Yes, Captain! Apologies for this show of weakness. I overstepped."
"Yes, Captain! Apologies for this show of weakness. I overstepped."

languages.text: 「ああ、牙花で尻を噛まれろ！艦長、昔と変わらない。考えが変わる前に狩りに行こう」
languages.original_text: "Ah, bite me in the arse with a fang-flower! Captain, just like old times. Let's get hunting before I change my mind."

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、牙花で尻を噛まれろ！艦長、昔と変わらない。考えが変わる前に狩りに行こう。」

languages.text: "Yüzbaşım! Bu zayıflık göstergesi için özür dilerim. Haddimi aştım."
languages.original_text: "Yes, Captain! Apologies for this show of weakness. I overstepped."

traits.locale_text: "Yüzbaşım! Bu zayıflık göstergesi için özür dilerim. Haddimi aştım."

languages.text: «¡Sí, capitana! Perdón por este momento de debilidad. Me he extralimitado».
languages.original_text: "Yes, Captain! Apologies for this show of weakness. I overstepped."

traits.locale_text: «¡Sí, capitana! Perdón por este momento de debilidad. Me he extralimitado».

languages.text: “是，上尉！抱歉，我不该这么脆弱，刚才是我越界了。”
languages.original_text: "Yes, Captain! Apologies for this show of weakness. I overstepped."

traits.locale_text: “是，上尉！抱歉，我不该这么脆弱，刚才是我越界了。”

languages.text: « Oui, capitaine ! Veuillez me pardonner cet instant de faiblesse. Je suis allé trop loin. »
languages.original_text: "Yes, Captain! Apologies for this show of weakness. I overstepped."

traits.locale_text: « Oui, capitaine ! Veuillez me pardonner cet instant de faiblesse. Je suis allé trop loin. »

languages.text: "Ja, Captain! Verzeiht diesen Ausbruch von Schwäche." Ich vergaß mich."
languages.original_text: "Yes, Captain! Apologies for this show of weakness. I overstepped."

traits.locale_text: "Ja, Captain! Verzeiht diesen Ausbruch von Schwäche." Ich vergaß mich."
